calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2019 Continued To Mar-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Vivian Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to MAR-05-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
